settings.title: Wholesale & B2B
settings.subtitle: Partner with Relica to bring premium cookware to your customers at competitive margins.

settings.benefit_1_body: Attractive wholesale pricing with tiered discounts based on order volume.
settings.benefit_2_body: Co-branded marketing assets, product imagery, and sales training materials.
settings.benefit_3_body: Dedicated account managers, priority stock access, and fast fulfilment.
settings.success_message: Thank you! Our B2B team will contact you within 2 business days.
